title: wedelia bahamensis
intro: Wedelia bahamensis, also known as Bahamian wedelia or yellow flower, is a flowering plant native to the Bahamas and parts of the Caribbean. It is a member of the sunflower family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Wedelia bahamensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
